short_summary: Iran deal, Cuba sanctions, domestic moves
rationale: Trump's claimed Iran settlement is a major fresh policy development with direct implications for US military posture and oil markets; Cuba sanctions and Hegseth's Guantánamo visit add to active domestic policy churn affecting Americans.

top_events.title: Trump claims US-Iran 'great settlement', cancels new strikes
top_events.summary: Major claimed diplomatic breakthrough; if real, reduces risk of US military engagement in Middle East and could ease oil prices; directly relevant to US residents via gas prices and military risk.

top_events.title: Trump administration sanctions Cuba's national oil company
top_events.summary: New Cuba sanctions and Hegseth's Guantánamo visit signal active policy escalation; limited direct daily impact for most Americans but politically significant.

top_events.title: Man pleads guilty to slaying top Democrat and her husband in Minnesota
top_events.summary: Domestic political violence case; notable for political climate but limited broader daily-life impact.
